questions.statement: <strong>Which of the following is the incorrectly spelt word?</strong>

<p><strong><span style="">Choose the meaning of the italicized idiom used in the given sentence. </span></strong></p>

<p><span style="">He has been <u><strong>chasing his tail</strong></u> by trying to sell the product but he has not been able to meet his target.</span></p>
options: <span style="">Spending a lot of ineffectual time and energy</span> /
<span style="">Doing a lot of hard work</span> /

questions.statement:
<p><strong>Directions: Select the word which means the same as the group of words given. </strong></p>

<p>A deep fissure in the earth&#39;s surface</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word.</p>

<p>Fret</p>

<p>&ldquo;The judge&rsquo;s standing in the legal community, though shaken by false allegations of wrongdoing, remained _______.&rdquo;</p>

<p>The word that best fills the blank in the above sentence is:</p>

<p>Fill in the blank with the most appropriate option.</p>

<p>The horn of the car ahead was _________&nbsp;by the resistance of the thick air.</p>

<p>Choose the appropriate word to complete the given sentence.</p>

<p>Nancy&#39;s ____ spirit helped her overcome numerous personal and professional challenges.</p>

<p>Choose the appropriate word to complete the given sentence.&nbsp;</p>

<p>This novel is one of the most ____ pieces of literature in the history of the English language.</p>

<p>Choose the appropriate word to complete the given sentence.&nbsp;</p>

<p>The quiet corners of the library provide a(n) ____ haven for students who wish to study in peace.</p>

<p><strong>Direction: Select the most appropriate phrasal verb to fill in the blank.</strong></p>

<p>The driver very subtly ______ the traffic violation he committed.</p>
